expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured to resolve space ID from requests
expectations.evidence: SpaceIdProvider with resolveSpaceId function is configured and returns spaceId

expectations.text: Separate token storage per tenant/space is implemented
expectations.evidence: SpaceTokenStorageFactory creates and manages separate TokenStorage per spaceId

expectations.text: CoSec-Space-Id header is properly set on requests
expectations.evidence: CoSecConfigurer with spaceIdProvider handles CoSec-Space-Id header via CoSecRequestInterceptor

expectations.text: Multi-tenant fetcher registry or factory pattern is used
expectations.evidence: MultiSpaceFetcherRegistry class manages separate Fetcher instances per space
signIn() and signOut() methods manage tokens for each space independently

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Multi-space authentication is properly implemented using CoSec framework.
